source: Iran Health Ministry / HRANA / Hengaw / Iranian Red Crescent
note: Iran Health Ministry (official): 1,444+ killed, 18,551+ injured as of Mar 14. HRANA NGO: 2,800+ incl. 181+ children. Hengaw: 4,300+ total first 10 days. Iran UN ambassador: ~10,000 civilian sites struck. Pentagon denies targeting civilian infrastructure. 3.2M Iranians displaced per UNHCR. 6,000+ targets struck (CENTCOM). Internet blackout 290+ hrs (~1% connectivity) severely limits independent verification.
Schoolgirls and staff killed in missile strike on primary school.
Includes Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei; figures are evolving.

13 KIA confirmed as of Mar 14 (Time Mar 10; NPR Mar 2). Includes: 6 Army Reserve killed in Kuwait drone strike (Feb 28); Sgt. Benjamin N. Pennington (1st Space Brigade, died Mar 8 from wounds at Prince Sultan AB); 6 KC-135 crew (crashed Iraq Mar 13 — rescue op ongoing, presumed killed). ~140 total wounded; vast majority minor, 108 returned to duty.

15 killed in Israel from Iranian missile/drone attacks. Includes 9 killed at Beit Shemesh synagogue; 2 civilians killed by Iranian cluster warhead missile in Yehud (Mar 10); 58 hospitalized in most intense barrage (Mar 13, targeting Palmachim Airbase, Ovda Airbase, Shin Bet HQ). 174+ attack waves recorded since Feb 28.

Includes 2 armed forces officers killed in helicopter crash (Mar 9) during operations. 4 killed and 112 injured from Iranian strikes. 21 drones hit civilian targets. Fujairah oil facility fire from debris.

source: Lebanese health authorities / Lebanon Information Ministry
note: 850 killed including 107 children, 66 women, 32 health workers. 2,100+ injured. 800,000+ displaced. Separate Israel-Lebanon ceasefire track forming — France mediating, Ron Dermer leading for Israel. Lebanese PM Nawaf Salam supportive; Hezbollah has not responded. Israeli DM Katz warns Israel will 'take the territory' if Lebanon cannot control Hezbollah.
Includes 4 Popular Mobilization Forces fighters killed; 3 injured.

Chief Warrant Officer Arnaud Frion, 7th Battalion of Chasseurs Alpins (Varces), killed in Iranian drone strike on joint French-Peshmerga base at Mala Qara, Makhmour district (40km from Erbil), March 13. First French combat fatality. Macron called it 'unacceptable.'

1 Indian crew member killed aboard MV Safesea Vishnu (Basra, Mar 13); 1 crew killed off Oman coast (Mar 1); 1 other in earlier Hormuz attack. 25+ crew rescued in Basra attacks. 16 ships struck in Gulf total.
At least 32 injured (including children) from Iranian strike on Sitra island; Bapco refinery struck causing force majeure; 1 fatality from earlier intercepted missile debris.

Two foreign nationals (Indian and Bangladeshi) killed in Iranian projectile strike on Al-Kharj compound. IRGC claimed target was radar systems. Saudi forces intercepted UAVs targeting Shaybah oil field.
Fatality and injuries from projectile hitting a tanker off Muscat coast.
Jordan targeted by 119 Iranian missiles and drones since Feb 28. No fatalities reported.
Protesters stormed US Consulate; security forces opened fire.
